title: Trevor Law Group
summary: The Trevor Law Group was a three-member Beverly Hills law firm notable in California and nationally for their heavy-handed tort law abuse. In 2002, it was alleged that they engaged in a form of extortion by threatening to sue thousands of businesses for violating a now-defunct provision of the Business & Professions Code, then offering to "settle" for a few thousand dollars apiece. The investigation was the largest in the history of the State Bar of California, and three principals of the firm were recommended for disbarment. They eventually gave up being lawyers.
